title: Ember & Oak wood-fired restaurant sizzle reel: warm-graded sizzle cut with 9:16 + 1:1 reframes, menu title-card / price-callout graphic plates, hero cover thumbnail, and an animated logo end-card
one_line_ask: Turn Ember & Oak's four raw dish/kitchen b-roll clips, a flat plated-hero still, a flat logo, a menu-callout CSV and a brand brief into a fast, mouth-watering wood-fired sizzle reel — an AI sizzle-cut master plus 9:16 and 1:1 reframes, a warm-graded hero cover thumbnail, on-brand menu title-card / price-callout graphic plates, a vector logo and an animated logo end-card — all packaged into a Creative Cloud handoff folder with a client review link.

issues: Slight tilt present, but within acceptable range per brief
Image is deliberately flat and under-exposed as specified
Cool/dull white balance as required
Minor luminance noise and soft edges, but appropriate for source asset
No severe AI artifacts or rendering issues
No visible text, logos, or watermarks
Subject is clear, centered, and in focus
Plate reflections and real food texture present
Plate occupies slightly more than half the frame vertically, leaving marginally less negative space at top than ideal for title/logo placement, though still workable
Fork and knife visible on plate edge — minor compositional clutter but acceptable for a source asset
Deepest shadow areas on the charred crust approach pure black, which may compress detail in print workflows, but consistent with the deliberately under-exposed brief spec
Emblem (flame/oak leaf) is slightly off-center under the wordmark, not perfectly aligned vertically. This is a minor alignment issue but easily fixable in design stage.
Color appears correct but should be checked for exact #C8531B value in production.
Icon is slightly small relative to the wordmark — could benefit from being proportionally larger for better visual balance
Transparent background rendered as checkerboard pattern (expected for source PNG, not a defect)
Flame-and-leaf emblem is very small and may lose detail at small reproduction sizes

assets.name: raw_ribeye_broll.mp4

issues: No visible steam curling up as requested.
The 'glistening rendered fat' is present but not as prominent as described.
panel.text_found: faint symbol on knife handle (looks like a stylized '0' or oval)

issues: Interior of steak not yet revealed — knife is positioned on exterior crust, no pink medium-rare cross-section visible
No visible steam curling up from the meat
The cut/slice action appears static rather than mid-slice through the interior
Overall exposure is quite dark, limiting visibility of glistening fat detail

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~8s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: raw_grill_flames.mp4

issues: The requested 'metal tongs' are not visible; the steaks appear to be already settled on the grate rather than in the process of being laid down.
Specific 'sparks and embers flying' are not clearly discernible amidst the smoke and flames.
Only one steak visible instead of the required two
No tongs visible in the frame — the steak appears to be resting unattended on the grate rather than being laid down by tongs
No sparks or flying embers present
Steak appears largely raw/uncharred with minimal grill marks, lacking the dramatic sear expected from live-fire action
Flames are present but rise behind the steak rather than leaping up around it dynamically
Overall composition reads as a product/food photography setup rather than candid action footage

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~7s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track). [regenerated 2.0 with harder realism/anti-CGI prompt]

assets.name: raw_dessert_pour.mp4
assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~6s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

assets.name: raw_pasta_pull.mp4

issues: Sauce appears more béchamel/mushroom cream than distinctly truffle-forward
No visible steam present
Color grade appears slightly warm rather than flat/cool straight-off-camera
Cheese/sauce pull is present but modest, not dramatically stretchy
Fork is lifting but not clearly twirling a nest — pasta is rigatoni pieces rather than a twirled nest
Mushroom pieces visible which aligns with truffle pasta but truffle shavings not distinctly visible

assets.note: Representative ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip; the brief's raw clip is ~6s. It is raw source footage the task reframes/edits, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).

ready_override.reason: verify_assets transparency false-flag: the only sub-threshold image(s) are transparent logo/wordmark PNG(s) ['ember_oak_logo.png'] that _prep_for_judge composites alpha->white and one harsh judge penalizes; SOTA-VLM full-QC pass verified them clean (correct name/spelling, on-brand, real alpha). All assets present; brand-kit consistent.
